message.content:
Saya sedang merancang penambahan modul RAWAT INAP dan IGD ke aplikasi HIS oftalmologi "Arumed" (instance Prima Vision) yang saat ini HANYA rawat jalan. Working dir: d:\Arumed-PrimaVision. Frontend Vue 3.5 di `arumed-frontend/`, backend Laravel di `backend/`.

Tugasmu: pahami POLA bagaimana sebuah modul baru ditambahkan (frontend + RBAC + routing), supaya rancangan modul Rawat Inap & IGD bisa mengikuti pola yang sudah ada. Laporkan dengan path file + nomor baris.

1. **Router** (`arumed-frontend/src/router/index.js`): struktur definisi route, meta (title, permission, layout), auth guard beforeEach. Bagaimana route baru + permission gate didaftarkan?

2. **Sidebar** (`arumed-frontend/src/components/layout/AppSidebar.vue`): bagaimana menu item didefinisikan, di-group per section, dan di-filter via `auth.can('module.action')`? Tunjukkan struktur daftar menu.

3. **RBAC seeding**: cari `PermissionSeeder` dan `RolePermissionSeeder` di `backend/database/seeders/`. Bagaimana daftar 23 modul √ó R/W/D permission didefinisikan? Bagaimana cara menambah modul permission baru? Tunjukkan array modul.

4. **Pola Controller+Service+Routes untuk satu modul**: ambil contoh modul yang relatif self-contained (mis. Penunjang atau Bedah) ‚Äî tunjukkan bagaimana routes di `backend/routes/api.php` di-group, controller-nya, dan service-nya. Berapa file yang biasanya disentuh saat menambah 1 modul stasiun?

5. **Pola Pinia store + api.js**: lihat `arumed-frontend/src/services/api.js` (helper per-domain) dan satu store contoh (mis. `dokterStore` atau `penunjangStore` di `arumed-frontend/src/stores/`). Bagaimana store memanggil api helper?

6. **Jumlah & nama**: konfirmasi jumlah file di backend/app/Http/Controllers, Services, Models, dan frontend views & stores (untuk validasi skala).

Laporkan terstruktur per poin dengan path:baris dan contoh kode singkat. Read-only ‚Äî jangan ubah apa pun.

content.text: Saya akan melakukan eksplorasi sistematis terhadap pola penambahan modul di Arumed. Mari kita mulai dengan memahami struktur keseluruhan, lalu detail setiap aspek.
Baik, saya memahami ini adalah task explorasi read-only. Mari saya gunakan skill context untuk pemahaman cepat, kemudian diving deep ke setiap poin.

Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\Lenovo\.claude\skills\skillarchitecturearumed

# Arumed Apps ‚Äî ARCHITECTURE

> Dokumen arsitektur tingkat-atas untuk **Arumed Apps**, sistem informasi
> klinik mata (Klinik Mata Arunika). Tujuan: jadi pintu masuk pertama
> developer baru ‚Äî tahu di mana setiap modul tinggal, kontrak API antar
> layer, dan bagaimana frontend Vue berbicara dengan backend Laravel.

---

## 1. Overview

Arumed Apps adalah HIS (Hospital Information System) khusus oftalmologi,
**100% paperless**, dirancang untuk memenuhi PMK No. 24/2022 sekaligus
terintegrasi dengan BPJS (VClaim, Antrean, iCare, INA-CBGs) dan Satu Sehat
(Kemenkes). Sistem terdiri dari **dua deployable** yang hidup di satu repo:

| Aspek         | Backend                            | Frontend                                 |
|---------------|------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| Stack         | Laravel 13.8 + PHP 8.3             | Vue 3.5 + Vite 5                         |
| Auth          | JWT (`tymon/jwt-auth` 2.3)         | Bearer token di `localStorage`           |
| Default DB    | SQLite (dev) / PostgreSQL (prod)   | ‚Äî                                        |
| State mgmt    | Service classes (DI ke controller) | Pinia (composition API style)            |
| Real-time     | Laravel Reverb (event broadcast)   | `pusher-js` (Reverb protocol)            |
| Folder        | `backend/`                         | `arumed-frontend/`                       |
| Dev port      | `:8000` (`php artisan serve`)      | `:5173` (`npm run dev`, proxy `/api`)    |
| Base path API | `/api/v1/*`                        | `import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? '/api/v1'` |

Audience dokumen: developer baru, reviewer, integrator (BPJS/Satu Sehat).

---

## 2. Folder Structure

Struktur disusun per-deployable. Komentar inline menjelaskan kenapa folder
itu penting ‚Äî bukan sekadar nama folder.

```
arumed-apps/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ backend/                          # Laravel 13.8 ‚Äî REST API + integrasi eksternal
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ app/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Events/                   # AdmisiQueueUpdated, TriaseQueueUpdated, AntreanTvUpdated (broadcast Reverb)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Http/Controllers/         # 27 controller per-modul (thin: validate + delegate ke Service)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Http/Middleware/          # RoleMiddleware + PermissionMiddleware (RBAC gate)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Models/                   # 72 Eloquent model (dikelompokkan per domain di Section 4.3)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Services/                 # 28 service ‚Äî semua business logic & integrasi pihak ketiga
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Providers/AppServiceProvider.php
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ bootstrap/app.php             # Bootstrap gaya Laravel 11+ (no Kernel.php) ‚Äî CORS + apiPrefix=api + middleware alias role/permission
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ config/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ cors.php                  # Izinkan origin dev frontend :5173
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ database.php
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ database/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ migrations/               # 96 migration (urutan kronologis, lihat Section 7)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ seeders/                  # 17 seeder (+ PermissionSeeder + RolePermissionSeeder); default chain (PatientVisitSeeder opsional manual)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ routes/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ api.php                   # Semua endpoint ‚Äî grup di bawah prefix /v1 (final: /api/v1/*)
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ composer.json
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ arumed-frontend/                  # Vue 3 SPA ‚Äî UI semua modul HIS
    ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ src/
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ main.js                   # Entry: install Pinia + Router, mount #app
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ App.vue                   # Root: dengar event arumed:session-expired
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ router/index.js           # Definisi route + beforeEach (auth guard)
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ layouts/AppLayout.vue     # Shell: sidebar + topbar + <RouterView/>
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ views/                    # 18 view (1 view = 1 modul; lihat Section 6.1) ‚Äî incl. JadwalDokterView
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ components/layout/        # AppSidebar (permission-filtered menu), AppTopbar, BrandMark (tidak ada UI lib eksternal)
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ services/api.js           # Axios instance + helper per-domain (authApi, queueApi, dokterApi, refraksiApi, antreanTvApi, jadwalDokterApi, userApi, roleApi, permissionApi, dll)
    ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ stores/                   # 11 Pinia store (+ jadwalDokterStore, dataPenggunaStore)
    ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ assets/styles/            # tokens.css (design token) + base.css (reset + animasi)
    ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ vite.config.js                # Alias @/ ‚Üí src/; proxy /api ‚Üí :8000
    ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ package.json
    ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ index.html
```

Direktori lain di root (`Docs/`, `assets/`, `skill/`, `hello.js`) bersifat
auxiliary dan tidak masuk runtime aplikasi.

---

## 3. Tech Stack & Dependencies

Bagian ini mengunci versi runtime yang **harus** dipasang sebelum menjalankan
project ‚Äî gunakan saat onboarding mesin baru atau diagnose error
version-mismatch.

### 3.1 Backend ‚Äî `backend/composer.json`

```json
"require": {
  "php": "^8.3",
  "laravel/framework": "^13.8",
  "laravel/tinker": "^3.0",
  "tymon/jwt-auth": "^2.3"
},
"require-dev": {
  "fakerphp/faker": "^1.23",
  "laravel/pail": "^1.2.5",
  "laravel/pao": "^1.0.6",
  "laravel/pint": "^1.27",
  "mockery/mockery": "^1.6",
  "nunomaduro/collision": "^8.6",
  "phpunit/phpunit": "^12.5.12"
}
```

Catatan:
- `tymon/jwt-auth` adalah satu-satunya provider auth ‚Äî `auth:api` guard
  bergantung pada package ini. Wajib jalankan `php artisan jwt:secret`
  sebelum login.
- `laravel/pail` menyediakan `php artisan pail` (log tail real-time, dipakai
  oleh script `composer dev`).

### 3.2 Frontend ‚Äî `arumed-frontend/package.json`

```json
"dependencies": {
  "vue": "^3.5.0",
  "vue-router": "^4.4.0",
  "pinia": "^2.2.0",
  "axios": "^1.7.0",
  "pusher-js": "^8.5.0"
},
"devDependencies": {
  "vite": "^5.4.0",
  "@vitejs/plugin-vue": "^5.1.0"
}
```

Tidak ada UI library eksternal (Vuetify/Quasar/shadcn) ‚Äî semua komponen
custom dengan CSS scoped + design token di `src/assets/styles/tokens.css`.

---

## 4. Backend Components

Layer pemisahan: **Routes ‚Üí Controller (validate + DI service) ‚Üí Service
(business logic) ‚Üí Model (Eloquent)**. Service jadi titik sentuh integrasi
eksternal (BPJS, Satu Sehat) supaya controller tetap tipis.

### 4.1 Controllers (`backend/app/Http/Controllers/`)

Semua 27 controller ekstends `App\Http\Controllers\Controller` (base class)
dan menerima service via constructor DI (lihat pola di `AuthController.php`).

| Controller                  | Routes Prefix      | Purpose                                                                  |
|-----------------------------|--------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `AuthController`            | `/auth/*`          | Login, logout, refresh JWT, profil `/me`, ganti password                  |
| `QueueController`           | `/antrian/*`       | Generic queue ops cross-station ‚Äî snapshot Antrean TV, advance, panggil   |
| `AdmisiController`          | `/admisi/*` + `/anjungan/*` (public kiosk) | Pendaftaran pasien (full + walk-in merge), kunjungan, cancel, update pasien, antrian admisi, jadwal dokter, BPJS-SEP, **tiket umum kiosk** |
| `PerawatController`         | `/perawat/*`       | Antrian triase + asesmen keperawatan (NurseAssessment), vital history    |
| `RefraksiController`        | `/refraksi/*`      | Antrian refraksi, pemeriksaan refraksi, resep kacamata, rekomendasi IOL  |
| `DokterController`          | `/dokter/*`        | RME dokter (tab2/tab3/tab4), tindakan, resep, order penunjang, TTD       |
| `PenunjangController`       | `/penunjang/*`     | Order + hasil pemeriksaan penunjang (lab, imaging, biometri)             |
| `BedahController`           | `/bedah/*`         | Jadwal operasi, request BHP/IOL, laporan operasi, post-op                |
| `FarmasiController`         | `/farmasi/*`       | Dispensing resep + surgery-request fulfillment. (Stok obat/BHP/IOL pindah ke modul Inventori Farmasi.) |
| `KasirController`           | `/kasir/*`         | Invoice + item billing, COB, watermark, laporan harian                   |
| `KlaimController`           | `/klaim/*`         | Workflow klaim BPJS (DRAFT ‚Üí REVIEW ‚Üí VERIFIED ‚Üí SUBMITTED), INA-CBGs    |
| `RekamMedisController`      | `/rekam-medis/*`   | Riwayat pasien, dokumen (versioning), verifikasi QR                      |
| `DashboardController`       | `/dashboard/*`     | KPI, follow-up tracking, alert stok/BPJS/Satu Sehat                      |
| `MasterDataController`      | `/master/*`        | Profil klinik, pegawai, ICD-9/10, wilayah, prosedur + kategori (autogen TND-NNN), template/jenis/nomor dokumen, stasiun-document mapping. (Tarif tindakan/obat/bhp/iol pindah ke `TarifPaketController`.) |
| `TarifPaketController`      | `/tarif-paket/*`   | Tarif per-penjamin (tindakan/obat/bhp/iol CRUD + CSV per-insurer), insurer detail (TPA parent/child inheritance), paket bedah CRUD + items + tariffs per-penjamin (auto diskon) |
| `InventoryPriceController`  | `/inventori-farmasi/harga/*` | Penentuan harga jual (HPP & HJA) per item Obat/BHP/IOL + PPN rate global. Formula `HJA = HPP √ó (1+margin%) √ó (1+ppn?)` |
| `SupplierController`        | `/inventori-farmasi/supplier/*` | CRUD supplier (autogen `SUP-NNN`); delete blocked kalau dipakai PO/GRN |
| `PurchaseOrderController`   | `/inventori-farmasi/pembelian/*` | CRUD Purchase Order (autogen `PO-YYYYMM-NNNN`), cancel endpoint, status enum DRAFT/SENT/PARTIAL/RECEIVED/CANCELED. Item nested |
| `GoodsReceiptController`    | `/inventori-farmasi/penerimaan/*` | CRUD GRN (autogen `GRN-YYYYMM-NNNN`), prepare-from-PO (auto-fill `qty_remaining`), delete reverse stok. Item per-batch+expiry |
| `IntegrasiController`       | `/integrasi/*`     | Status integrasi + log VClaim/Antrean/iCare/INA-CBGs/Satu Sehat          |
| `JadwalDokterController`    | `/jadwal-dokter/*` + `/antrean-tv/dokter-aktif` (public) | CRUD jadwal mingguan dokter (Senin‚ÄìMinggu √ó jam praktik √ó poliklinik √ó ruangan), toggle is_active, list aktif hari ini (untuk dropdown admisi + panel TV). Dynamic queue prefix `D{room}` saat dokter dipakai di Visit |
| `UserController`            | `/rbac/users/*`    | (Superadmin) CRUD user + toggle aktif + reset password ‚Äî guard: tidak boleh hapus diri sendiri / Superadmin terakhir |
| `RoleController`            | `/rbac/roles/*`    | (Superadmin) CRUD role + sync permissions; proteksi role Superadmin & role yang masih dipakai user |
| `PermissionController`      | `/rbac/permissions/*` | (Superadmin) Read-only list permission (grouped per modul atau flat) ‚Äî sumber matrix UI |

### 4.2 Services (`backend/app/Services/`)

Pola: controller hanya `validate()` lalu memanggil service method. Service
boleh saling memanggil (mis. `KlaimService` memanggil `InaCbgsService` untuk
grouping sebelum submit). **`QueueService` adalah orchestrator pusat**
untuk semua transisi antrian ‚Äî per-station service (Admisi/Perawat/Refraksi/
Dokter/Penunjang/Bedah/Kasir/Farmasi) hanya thin wrapper yang delegate ke
`QueueService::advanceFromStation()`.

| Service                  | Dipanggil dari                 | Tanggung jawab                                              |
|--------------------------|--------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|
| `AuthService`            | `AuthController`               | Login/logout JWT, refresh token, hash password              |
| `QueueService`           | `QueueController` + 8 station service | Generate queue number, **panggil (boleh re-call: WAITING/CALLED)**, mulai/lewati/batal, `advanceFromStation()` dengan matrix transisi Section 11.3, broadcast event Reverb |
| `AdmisiService`          | `AdmisiController`             | Buat Visit, **`registerVisit` SKIP antrian ADMISI** (direct admisi ‚Üí enqueue langsung TRIASE+REFRAKSIONIS dengan TR-NNN shared, `current_station=TRIASE`), **kiosk tiket umum** (`ambilTiketUmumKiosk`), **merge walk-in** (`daftarkanWalkIn` ‚Äî auto-advance ke TRIASE+REFRAKSIONIS), `selesaiAdmisi` ‚Üí delegate `QueueService`, `cancelKunjungan` (boleh dari station mana pun kecuali SELESAI), `getDashboard` (incl. `cancel_count`), `generateNoRM` (retry-loop self-healing), `generateWalkInNik` |
| `PerawatService`         | `PerawatController`            | CRUD `NurseAssessment`, finalize (lock); `selesaiAntrian` ‚Üí `QueueService` |
| `RefraksiService`        | `RefraksiController`           | `RefractionRecord` + `RefractionPrescription` + `IolRecommendation`; `selesaiAntrian` ‚Üí `QueueService` |
| `DokterService`          | `DokterController`             | `DoctorExamination` (tab2/4), `MedicalResume`; `selesaiAntrian` ‚Üí `QueueService` |
| `PenunjangService`       | `PenunjangController`          | `DiagnosticOrder` + `DiagnosticResult`; `selesaiAntrian` ‚Üí `QueueService` (balik ke DOKTER) |
| `BedahService`           | `BedahController`              | `SurgerySchedule`, `SurgeryRecord`, `SurgeryIolUsage`; `selesaiAntrian` ‚Üí `QueueService` |
| `FarmasiService`         | `FarmasiController`            | Dispensing `Prescription`, fulfillment `SurgeryRequest`; `selesaiAntrian` ‚Üí `QueueService` (end of flow). **Stok pindah** ke `inventory_stocks` (lihat `GoodsReceiptService`) ‚Äî dispensing belum baca dari tabel itu, TODO FEFO. |
| `KasirService`           | `KasirController`              | Generate `BillingInvoice`, hitung COB, bayar/cancel; `selesaiAntrian` ‚Üí `QueueService` |
| `KlaimService`           | `KlaimController`              | Workflow status klaim + audit log                           |
| `RekamMedisService`      | `RekamMedisController`         | `PatientDocument` + `MedicalRecordVersion` (immutable)      |
| `DashboardService`       | `DashboardController`          | Agregasi statistik dari beberapa tabel                      |
| `MasterDataService`      | `MasterDataController`         | CRUD master + CSV tindakan (header friendly tanpa kode, lookup by `nama+kategori`); `generateProcedureCode($kategori)` ‚Üí `TND-NNN` per prefix |
| `TarifPaketService`      | `TarifPaketController`         | Tarif per-penjamin (CRUD + CSV per-insurer per-type), insurer parent/child inheritance, paket bedah composite (items + tariffs per-penjamin, auto-recalc `total_base_price` & `discount_amount`) |
| `InventoryPriceService`  | `InventoryPriceController`     | HPP/HJA per item Obat/BHP/IOL, PPN global singleton, formula recompute saat PPN diubah |
| `SupplierService`        | `SupplierController`           | CRUD supplier, autogen `SUP-NNN`, guard delete by FK |

### 4.4 Events (`backend/app/Events/`)

Dipakai untuk push real-time ke frontend via Reverb (protokol Pusher).
Frontend dengar via `pusher-js` di store/view masing-masing.

- `AdmisiQueueUpdated` ‚Äî broadcast saat antrian ADMISI berubah, channel
  `admisi-queue`. Didengar `admisiStore.js` (AdmisiView). Dua action:
  - `'added'` ‚Äî dari kiosk Anjungan (`ambilTiketUmumKiosk`) saat row baru muncul
  - `'updated'` ‚Äî dari `QueueService::broadcastQueueUpdate` saat panggil/selesai/dll.
- `TriaseQueueUpdated` ‚Äî broadcast saat antrian TRIASE atau REFRAKSIONIS
  berubah, channel `triase-queue`. Didengar `perawatStore.js` (PerawatView) +
  `refraksiStore.js` (RefraksionisView).
- `AntreanTvUpdated` ‚Äî **generic event untuk SEMUA station**
  (ADMISI/TRIASE/REFRAKSIONIS/DOKTER/PENUNJANG/BEDAH/KASIR/FARMASI), channel
  `antrean-tv`. Didengar AntreanTVView. Fire dari `QueueService::broadcastQueueUpdate`
  (paralel dengan per-channel di atas) + `QueueService::enqueue` (action `'added'`
  saat row baru di-spawn lewat advance) + `AdmisiService::ambilTiketUmumKiosk`.
  Pakai ini kalau view butuh dengar SEMUA station via satu subscription.

### 4.5 Middleware & Auth ‚Äî `backend/bootstrap/app.php`

```php
return Application::configure(basePath: dirname(__DIR__))
    ->withRouting(
        web:        __DIR__.'/../routes/web.php',
        api:        __DIR__.'/../routes/api.php',
        commands:   __DIR__.'/../routes/console.php',
        health:     '/up',
        apiPrefix:  'api',           // semua route api.php otomatis dapat prefix /api
    )
    ->withMiddleware(function (Middleware $middleware): void {
        $middleware->use([
            \Illuminate\Http\Middleware\HandleCors::class,
        ]);
    })
    ->withExceptions(fn (Exceptions $e) => null)
    ->create();
```

Penjelasan:
- **CORS** global (untuk dev frontend di port 5173). Konfigurasi
  origin/methods ada di `backend/config/cors.php`.
- **`auth:api` guard** dipakai via `Route::middleware('auth:api')->group(...)`
  di `routes/api.php` ‚Äî di-back oleh `tymon/jwt-auth`.
- **`role` & `permission` middleware alias** (di-register di `bootstrap/app.php`):
  - `Route::middleware('role:superadmin,admisi')` ‚Äî lolos jika role user ada di daftar; Superadmin selalu lolos
  - `Route::middleware('permission:admisi.write|kasir.write')` ‚Äî pipe = OR; cek `User::hasPermission()` yang baca permission dari `Role::permissions` (pivot `role_permissions`). Superadmin lolos via sentinel `*`.
  - Saat ini block `/v1/rbac/*` pakai `role:superadmin`. Block lain belum di-guard (TODO Stage berikutnya).
- **Public groups (di luar `auth:api`)**: `/v1/auth/login`, `/v1/rekam-medis/templates/*`
  (template auto-generate), `/v1/anjungan/tiket-umum` (kiosk self-service),
  `/v1/antrean-tv/snapshot` + `/v1/antrean-tv/dokter-aktif` (TV display + panel dokter aktif).
- Final base URL endpoint: `/api` (dari `apiPrefix`) + `/v1` (group di
  api.php) ‚Üí **`/api/v1/...`**.
- Health probe: `GET /up` (Laravel built-in, return 200 jika app siap).

## 5. API Routes / Endpoints

Semua route terdaftar di `backend/routes/api.php` di bawah `Route::prefix('v1')`.
Convention path memakai bahasa Indonesia (`/kunjungan`, `/antrian`,
`/pemeriksaan`) ‚Äî match dengan istilah klinik. Total ¬±310 endpoint.

**Convention status code**:
- `200` sukses, `201` (jarang dipakai ‚Äî kebanyakan response 200 dengan envelope)
- `401` JWT invalid/expired
- `403` lolos auth tapi tidak boleh aksi
- `422` validation error (format Laravel default)
- `500` exception unhandled

### 5.1 Auth (`/auth`)

### 5.1a Anjungan Mandiri ‚Äî kiosk public (`/anjungan`)

Endpoint **publik (no auth)** untuk kiosk self-service di lobby klinik
(`AnjunganView.vue`). Output: nomor antrean ADMISI tercetak. Backend buat
Patient placeholder dengan nama `"Belum Terdaftar"` + Visit + Queue, lalu
broadcast `AdmisiQueueUpdated('added')` ke channel `admisi-queue`. Petugas
admisi melengkapi identitas via `PUT /admisi/kunjungan/{id}/daftarkan-walkin`
(lihat Section 5.2).

| Method | Path                       | Action                            | Purpose                                  |
|--------|----------------------------|-----------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| POST   | `/anjungan/tiket-umum`     | `AdmisiController@anjunganTiketUmum` | Public ‚Äî buat Visit walk-in UMUM + Queue ADMISI, return `queue_number` |

NIK placeholder format: `'9' + 9-digit timestamp + 6-digit random` (16 char,
diawali `9` agar dibedakan dari NIK warga asli yang selalu kode wilayah 1-3).

### 5.1c Antrean TV ‚Äî public display (`/antrean-tv`)

Endpoint **publik (no auth)** untuk TV display di lobby. Mengembalikan
snapshot semua station hari ini (sama payload dengan `GET /antrian` yang
auth-required, tapi tanpa Bearer token). Frontend `AntreanTVView.vue` fetch
ini saat mount + polling fallback 30 detik kalau WS Reverb tidak tersedia.

| Method | Path                          | Action                       | Purpose                                  |
|--------|-------------------------------|------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| GET    | `/antrean-tv/snapshot`        | `QueueController@index`                  | Public ‚Äî snapshot semua station hari ini |

### 5.1b Antrian ‚Äî cross-cutting (`/antrian`)

Endpoint generic untuk operasi antrian lintas-station. Dipakai oleh

Per-station selesai/panggil tetap available di prefix masing-masing (mis.
`/dokter/antrian/{id}/selesai`); endpoint `/antrian/*` adalah generic
fallback dan TIDAK menerapkan gate validation per-station ‚Äî gate ada di
`QueueService::resolveNextStation` (lihat Section 11.4).

| Method | Path                              | Action                          | Purpose                                       |
|--------|-----------------------------------|---------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| GET    | `/antrian`                        | `QueueController@index`         | Snapshot semua station hari ini (Antrean TV) |
| GET    | `/antrian/station/{station}`      | `QueueController@byStation`     | Antrian per station (A/TRIASE/.../FARMASI)   |

### 5.18 Inventori Farmasi (`/inventori-farmasi`)

Modul standalone untuk operasional farmasi. Sub-menu: **Master** (Obat/BHP/IOL ‚Äî UI re-route ke `/master/*`), **Penentuan Harga** (HPP & HJA), **Supplier**, **Pembelian (PO)**, **Penerimaan (GRN)**.

| Method | Path                                                   | Purpose                                       |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| GET/PUT| `/inventori-farmasi/harga/settings`                    | PPN rate global singleton (`inventory_price_settings`). Update PPN ‚Üí auto recompute HJA semua row |
| GET    | `/inventori-farmasi/harga/{type}` (MEDICATION/BHP/IOL) | List item LEFT JOIN `inventory_prices` (item belum di-price tetap tampil sebagai "belum diset") |
| PUT/DELETE | `/inventori-farmasi/harga/{type}/{itemId}`         | Upsert/hapus harga per item; HJA = HPP √ó (1+margin%) √ó (PPN? 1+rate : 1) |
| CRUD   | `/inventori-farmasi/supplier[/{id}]`                   | CRUD supplier; autogen `SUP-NNN`; delete blocked kalau dipakai PO/GRN |
| GET/POST | `/inventori-farmasi/pembelian`                       | List PO (filter search/status/supplier/date) + Create PO |
| GET/PUT/DELETE | `/inventori-farmasi/pembelian/{id}`            | Detail/update/delete PO. Items locked kalau sudah ada GRN. Delete ditolak kalau status PARTIAL/RECEIVED |
| POST   | `/inventori-farmasi/pembelian/{id}/cancel`             | Cancel PO (ditolak kalau sudah ada GRN)       |
| GET    | `/inventori-farmasi/penerimaan/from-po/{poId}`         | Prepare GRN dari PO ‚Äî return items dengan `qty_remaining` (sisa qty_ordered - qty_received). **Wajib didaftar SEBELUM `/{id}`** |
| GET/POST | `/inventori-farmasi/penerimaan`                      | List GRN (filter search/supplier/po_id/date) + Create GRN |
| GET/DELETE | `/inventori-farmasi/penerimaan/{id}`               | Detail/delete GRN. Delete reverse stok + recompute PO status |

**Flow PO ‚Üí GRN ‚Üí Stok**:
1. Create PO `DRAFT` ‚Üí ubah ke `SENT` (kirim ke supplier).
2. Barang datang ‚Üí create GRN (link `po_id` atau direct). Validasi `qty_received ‚â§ qty_remaining` per item.
3. `GoodsReceiptService::createItemAndApplyStock()`:
   - Insert `goods_receipt_items` (qty, batch_no, expiry_date wajib > today).
   - Upsert `inventory_stocks` per `(item_type, item_id, batch_no)` ‚Äî increment qty_on_hand, set expiry_date & last_received_at.
   - `purchase_order_items.qty_received += qty`.
4. `updatePoStatus()`: total_received ‚â• total_ordered ‚Üí `RECEIVED`; partial ‚Üí `PARTIAL`; semua GRN dihapus ‚Üí balik ke `SENT`.
5. Delete GRN reverse semua effect di atas (stok per batch dihapus kalau qty=0).

**HPP weighted-average**: by-design NOT auto-updated dari GRN. User pilih manual via Penentuan Harga (sesuai feedback project). Hook tersedia di `GoodsReceiptService` kalau policy berubah.

**Auth guard** (`router.beforeEach`): 2 layer cek:
1. Jika `!useAuthStore().isAuthenticated` dan route bukan public
   (`['login', 'antrean-tv', 'anjungan']`) ‚Üí redirect ke `/login`.
2. Jika route punya `meta.permission` (single key) atau `meta.permissions`
   (array OR) dan `!auth.can(meta.permission)` ‚Üí redirect ke `/dashboard`.
   Superadmin selalu lolos via sentinel `["*"]` di `user.permissions`.

**`App.vue` onMounted** panggil `auth.fetchMe()` jika `isAuthenticated` ‚Äî refresh
`user.permissions` saat reload halaman (penting karena user yang login sebelum
sistem RBAC ditambahkan akan punya `permissions: []` di localStorage).

### 6.5 HTTP Layer (`src/services/api.js`)

```js
const api = axios.create({
  baseURL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL ?? '/api/v1',
  timeout: 15000,
  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', Accept: 'application/json' },
})

// Request: inject Bearer token
api.interceptors.request.use((cfg) => {
  const token = localStorage.getItem('auth_token')
  if (token) cfg.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`
  return cfg
})

// Response: dispatch custom event berdasarkan status
api.interceptors.response.use(null, (err) => {
  const s = err.response?.status
  if (s === 401)  window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('arumed:session-expired'))
  if (s === 403)  window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('arumed:forbidden', { detail: err }))
  if (s >= 500)   window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('arumed:server-error', { detail: err }))
  return Promise.reject(err)
})
```

Helper grouping per-domain:
`authApi`, `queueApi`, `visitApi`, `notifApi`, `followUpApi`, `perawatApi`,
`refraksiApi`, `dokterApi`, `penunjangApi`, `bedahApi`, `farmasiApi`,
`kasirApi`, `klaimApi`, `rekamMedisApi`, `dashboardApi`, `masterApi` (+`masterApi.supplier`),
`admisiApi`, `integrasiApi`, `anjunganApi`, `antreanTvApi`,
`jadwalDokterApi`, `userApi`, `roleApi`, `permissionApi`,
**`tarifPaketApi`** (tarif/insurer/paketBedah), **`inventoriHargaApi`** (HPP/HJA + PPN settings),

## 8. API Request/Response Format

Semua endpoint REST mengembalikan **envelope JSON standar** ‚Äî pola ini
ditegaskan di komentar header `routes/api.php` dan implementasi
`AuthController`.

### 8.1 Envelope Standar

```json
{
  "success": true,         // boolean ‚Äî true jika operasi sukses
  "data":    { ... },      // object | array | null ‚Äî payload utama
  "message": "Login berhasil",  // string ‚Äî pesan utk user (BIPA)
  "errors":  null          // object | null ‚Äî detail field error (umumnya 422)
}
```

### 8.2 Sample ‚Äî Login

```http
POST /api/v1/auth/login
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "username": "admin",
  "password": "secret123"
}
```

Response 200 OK:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "access_token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...",
    "token_type": "bearer",
    "expires_in": 3600,
    "user": {
      "id": 1,
      "username": "admin",
      "name": "Administrator",
      "role": { "id": 1, "name": "admin" },
      "employee": { "id": 1, "name": "Dr. ..." }
    }
  },
  "message": "Login berhasil",
  "errors": null
}
```

Response 401 Unauthorized (kredensial salah):

```json
{ "success": false, "data": null, "message": "Kredensial salah", "errors": null }
```

> Frontend: simpan `data.access_token` di `localStorage` sebagai
> `auth_token`. Setiap request setelahnya wajib header
> `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

### 8.3 Sample ‚Äî Authenticated Request

```http
GET /api/v1/admisi/dashboard
Authorization: Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9...
Accept: application/json
```

### 8.3a Sample ‚Äî Anjungan Kiosk (Public, No Auth)

```http
POST /api/v1/anjungan/tiket-umum
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json
```

Response 201 Created:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "queue_number": "A-007",
    "queue_id":     "019e4cfd-...-uuid",
    "visit_id":     "019e4cfd-...-uuid",
    "patient_id":   "019e4cfd-...-uuid",
    "no_rm":        "2026050007",
    "station":      "ADMISI"
  },
  "message": "Tiket umum diterbitkan",
  "errors": null
}
```

### 8.4 Sample ‚Äî Validation Error (422)

Mengikuti format default Laravel (BUKAN envelope kustom ‚Äî exception
`ValidationException` di-handle Laravel sebelum sempat dibungkus controller):

```json
{
  "message": "The username field is required.",
  "errors": {
    "username": ["The username field is required."]
  }
}
```

> Catatan: dua format berdampingan ini wajar di Laravel ‚Äî envelope kustom
> hanya saat controller mengembalikan response, sedangkan validation error
> tetap pakai format framework. Frontend perlu handle keduanya.

### 8.5 Sample ‚Äî Error Server (5xx)

Response interceptor di frontend akan **dispatch event**
`arumed:server-error` ‚Äî store/komponen bisa subscribe untuk tampilkan toast
global, sambil error tetap di-reject dari promise call asalnya.

## 9. Integration Points

Catatan operasional untuk integrasi pihak ketiga ‚Äî wajib dibaca sebelum
menyentuh modul BPJS/Satu Sehat.

| Integrasi              | Service Class           | Tabel Log                | Endpoint Utama                                  |
|------------------------|-------------------------|--------------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| **BPJS VClaim**        | `BpjsVClaimService`     | `bpjs_vclaim_logs`       | `/admisi/bpjs/*`, `/klaim/{id}/submit`          |
| **BPJS Antrean**       | `BpjsAntreanService`    | `bpjs_antrean_logs`      | `/admisi/bpjs/validasi-booking`                 |
| **BPJS iCare**         | (dalam `IntegrasiService`) | `bpjs_icare_logs`     | `/klaim/icare/monitoring`                       |
| **BPJS INA-CBGs**      | `InaCbgsService`        | `inacbgs_grouping_logs`  | `/klaim/{id}/grouping`                          |
| **Satu Sehat (Kemkes)**| `SatusehatService`      | `satusehat_sync_logs`, `satusehat_resource_logs` | `/integrasi/satusehat/*` |
| **Laravel Reverb (WS)**| `App\Events\*`          | ‚Äî                        | broadcast otomatis saat queue update            |

**Catatan operasional**:
- Semua HTTP call ke pihak ketiga harus melalui Service class ‚Äî jangan
  langsung dari controller (memudahkan retry & logging).
- Setiap call wajib menulis log ke tabel `*_logs` terkait (request, response,
  status code, timestamp). Tabel log adalah satu-satunya sumber audit ke
  vendor saat dispute.
- **Reverb (WebSocket)** opsional di dev ‚Äî frontend punya **fallback polling
  30s** di `queueStore`, `admisiStore`, `perawatStore` jika WS gagal connect.
- **Klaim BPJS** sekali `submit` tidak bisa dibatalkan ‚Äî frontend wajib
  modal konfirmasi (lihat `KlaimView` pattern).

## 10. Development Setup

### 10.1 Quick Start

```bash
# === Backend ===
cd backend
composer install
cp .env.example .env
php artisan key:generate
php artisan jwt:secret              # WAJIB ‚Äî set JWT_SECRET
php artisan migrate --seed          # buat schema + seed master data
php artisan serve                   # http://localhost:8000

# === Frontend (terminal lain) ===
cd arumed-frontend
npm install
npm run dev                         # http://localhost:5173
```

### 10.2 One-Shot Dev (Concurrently)

`composer dev` di `backend/composer.json` menjalankan 4 proses paralel
dengan `npx concurrently`:

| Nama   | Command                                                  | Untuk                    |
|--------|----------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------|
| server | `php artisan serve`                                      | API server               |
| queue  | `php artisan queue:listen --tries=1 --timeout=0`         | Job worker               |
| logs   | `php artisan pail --timeout=0`                           | Tail log real-time       |
| vite   | `npm run dev`                                            | Frontend HMR             |

### 10.3 Catatan Operasional

- **Database default**: SQLite (auto-created saat `composer setup`).
  Production: ganti `DB_CONNECTION=pgsql` + isi `DB_HOST`/`DB_DATABASE`/dll
  di `.env` lalu re-migrate.
- **CORS**: dev frontend di port 5173 sudah whitelisted via `config/cors.php`
  + global middleware `HandleCors`. Production: update `allowed_origins`.
- **WebSocket Reverb**: belum dikonfigurasi di `.env.example`. Jika dipakai,
  set `BROADCAST_DRIVER=reverb` + `REVERB_*` keys, lalu jalankan
  `php artisan reverb:start`.
- **JWT TTL**: default `JWT_TTL=60` (menit) ‚Äî refresh via
  `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh` sebelum expired.
- **Health check**: `GET /up` (200 OK jika app booted) ‚Äî dipakai monitoring.

## 11. Alur Layanan (Service Flow / Patient Journey)

Section ini mendeskripsikan **alur antrean pasien end-to-end** ‚Äî dari masuk
klinik sampai pulang. Setiap tahap layanan direpresentasikan oleh satu atau
lebih baris `queues` (lihat Section 7 schema), dan **semua transisi antar
station di-orkestrasi oleh `QueueService::advanceFromStation()`**. Per-
station service (Admisi/Perawat/Refraksi/Dokter/Penunjang/Bedah/Kasir/
Farmasi) hanya thin wrapper yang delegate ke `QueueService`, plus melakukan
gate validation (mis. Triase wajib finalize asesmen sebelum advance). Setiap
transisi men-trigger event Reverb sehingga `AntreanTVView.vue` update real-
time.

### 11.1 Stasiun Antrean (Queue Stations)

Konstanta `Queue::STATIONS` di model (`backend/app/Models/Queue.php`) +
field `station` di tabel `queues`. **Tahap Triase + Refraksionis (TR
conceptual) di-implementasi sebagai DUA baris `queues` paralel**
(`station=TRIASE` dan `station=REFRAKSIONIS`) yang share `visit_id` ‚Äî
perawat & refraksionis kerja independen, dan transisi ke DOKTER hanya
terjadi setelah **kedua** sub-task finalize.

| Kode    | Station        | Prefix | View                  | Catatan                          |
|---------|----------------|--------|-----------------------|----------------------------------|
| `A`     | ADMISI         | `A`    | `AdmisiView.vue`      |                                  |
| `T` + `R` | TRIASE + REFRAKSIONIS | `T` / `R` | `PerawatView.vue` + `RefraksionisView.vue` | 2 baris paralel, share `visit_id`, gate-ke-D=AND |
| `D`     | DOKTER         | `D`    | `DokterView.vue`      |                                  |
| `P`     | PENUNJANG      | `P`    | `PenunjangView.vue`   | Opsional (jika ada DiagnosticOrder open) |
| `B`     | BEDAH          | `B`    | `BedahView.vue`       | Opsional (planning=BEDAH **dan** jadwal HARI INI) |
| `K`     | KASIR          | `K`    | `KasirView.vue`       |                                  |
| `F`     | FARMASI        | `F`    | `FarmasiView.vue`     | Opsional (skip jika tidak ada Prescription open) |

> **Status `queues.status`** lifecycle: `WAITING ‚Üí CALLED ‚Üí IN_PROGRESS ‚Üí COMPLETED`
> (atau `CANCELLED`). Skip pakai action `lewati` yang reset `queue_sequence`
> ke akhir tanpa ubah status. Konstanta: `Queue::STATUS_*`,
> `Queue::ACTIVE_STATUSES`, helper `Queue::prefixFor($station)`.

### 11.3 Aturan Transisi (per Tahap)

Otoritas sumber: `QueueService::resolveNextStation(Visit, fromStation)` di
`backend/app/Services/QueueService.php`. Tabel di bawah adalah dokumentasi
human-readable dari method tersebut.

| #  | Dari Station   | Kondisi                                                                                | Station Berikutnya            | Endpoint utama                         |
|----|----------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------|----------------------------------------|
| 0a | **Direct Admisi (langsung ke loket)** | Petugas admisi proses pendaftaran lengkap di form (pasien tidak lewat kiosk) | **TRIASE + REFRAKSIONIS langsung** (skip antrian ADMISI sepenuhnya ‚Äî `current_station=TRIASE`, enqueue TR-NNN shared) | `POST /admisi/daftar` (`AdmisiService::registerVisit`) |
| 0b | Kiosk Anjungan | Pasien tap "Umum / Pasien Baru" di kiosk ‚Üí tiket walk-in            | **ADMISI** (Patient placeholder + Queue ADMISI WAITING) ‚Äî perlu di-merge petugas via `daftarkanWalkIn` | `POST /anjungan/tiket-umum` (public) |
| 1a | Kiosk (BPJS)   | Pasien `BPJS` + `kode_booking` atau `no_rujukan` valid (TODO Stage 2)                  | **TRIASE + REFRAKSIONIS** (skip ADMISI) | `POST /admisi/bpjs/validasi-booking` |
| 2  | **ADMISI** (queue dari kiosk walk-in) | Petugas panggil + `daftarkanWalkIn` (merge data placeholder ‚Üí pasien real) | **TRIASE + REFRAKSIONIS** (2 baris paralel, queue ADMISI di-COMPLETED) | `PUT /admisi/kunjungan/{visitId}/daftarkan-walkin` |
| 3a | **TRIASE**     | `NurseAssessment.is_finalized` AND `RefractionRecord.is_finalized`                     | **DOKTER**                    | `PUT /perawat/antrian/{id}/selesai`    |
| 3b | **REFRAKSIONIS** | Gate sama; jika DOKTER queue sudah dibuat partner ‚Üí tutup queue saja (`NO_OP`)        | **DOKTER** atau no-op         | `PUT /refraksi/antrian/{id}/selesai`   |
| 3c | TRIASE/REFRAKSIONIS | Gate BELUM passed                                                                 | **422 error** (queue tidak ditutup) | (gate validation di QueueService)  |
| 4a | **DOKTER**     | Ada `DiagnosticOrder` status `REQUESTED`/`IN_PROGRESS`                                 | **PENUNJANG**                 | `PUT /dokter/antrian/{id}/selesai`     |
| 4b | **DOKTER**     | `DoctorExamination.planning='BEDAH'` AND `SurgerySchedule.scheduled_date=today`        | **BEDAH**                     | `PUT /dokter/antrian/{id}/selesai`     |
| 4c | **DOKTER**     | Default (termasuk BEDAH dengan jadwal hari lain)                                       | **KASIR**                     | `PUT /dokter/antrian/{id}/selesai`     |
| 5  | **PENUNJANG**  | Hasil sudah dirilis                                                                    | **DOKTER** (kembali untuk pembacaan) | `PUT /penunjang/antrian/{id}/selesai` |
| 6  | **BEDAH**      | Operasi selesai                                                                        | **KASIR** (billing pasca-op)  | `PUT /bedah/antrian/{id}/selesai`      |
| 7a | **KASIR**      | Ada `Prescription` status `DRAFT`/`SUBMITTED`/`DISPENSING`                             | **FARMASI**                   | `PUT /kasir/antrian/{id}/selesai`      |
| 7b | **KASIR**      | Tidak ada resep open                                                                   | **SELESAI** (`current_station=SELESAI`) | sama                              |
| 8  | **FARMASI**    | Dispensing selesai                                                                     | **SELESAI** (pasien pulang)   | `PUT /farmasi/antrian/{id}/selesai`    |

**Sentinel di `resolveNextStation` return value:**

| Return                     | Arti                                                                            |
|----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `string` (mis. `'KASIR'`)  | Enqueue baris baru di station itu + set `visit.current_station`                 |
| `array<string>`            | Multi-enqueue paralel (mis. `[TRIASE, REFRAKSIONIS]` dari ADMISI)               |
| `QueueService::END_OF_FLOW`| Pasien pulang, set `visit.current_station='SELESAI'`, no enqueue                |
| `QueueService::NO_OP`      | Tutup queue saja (partner TR sudah trigger next), `current_station` tetap       |
| `null`                     | Gate belum passed ‚Üí throw 422, queue **tidak** ditutup                          |

### 11.4 Implementasi di Backend

**Komponen kunci:**

- **`backend/app/Services/QueueService.php`** ‚Äî orchestrator pusat. Method utama:
  - `generateQueueNumber($station, ?$room = null)` ‚Äî thread-safe per station
    per hari, format `{PREFIX}-{NNN}` (mis. `A-001`, `T-012`). Untuk station
    DOKTER, kalau `$room` diisi ‚Üí prefix dynamic `D{room}` (mis. `D1-001`,
    `D2-001`); sequence di-count per-prefix per-hari (D1 dan D2 independen).
  - `enqueue($visitId, $station, ?$sharedNumber = null)` ‚Äî buat baris
    `queues` baru dengan status `WAITING`. Untuk DOKTER, otomatis baca
    `visit.doctorSchedule.room` untuk pakai prefix `D{room}`. `$sharedNumber`
    optional: pakai nomor pre-generated (untuk pair TRIASE+REFRAKSIONIS yang
    share `TR-NNN`).
  - `panggil($queueId)` ‚Äî `WAITING ‚Üí CALLED`, set `called_at`, broadcast.
  - `mulai($queueId)` ‚Äî `CALLED ‚Üí IN_PROGRESS`, set `started_at`.
  - `lewati($queueId)` ‚Äî pindah ke akhir antrean station yang sama (reset
    `queue_sequence` ke `MAX+1`, status kembali `WAITING`).
  - `batal($queueId, $reason)` ‚Äî `CANCELLED`, no advance, log alasan.
  - `advanceFromStation($queueId, $expectedStation)` ‚Äî transaction:
    resolve next ‚Üí close current ‚Üí enqueue next (atau `END_OF_FLOW` /
    `NO_OP`) ‚Üí broadcast.
  - `resolveNextStation($visit, $fromStation)` ‚Äî matrix transisi (lihat
    Section 11.3).
  - `getAllActive()` ‚Äî snapshot semua station untuk `AntreanTVView`.

- **`backend/app/Models/Queue.php`** ‚Äî constants:
  - `STATION_ADMISI` / `STATION_TRIASE` / `STATION_REFRAKSIONIS` /
    `STATION_DOKTER` / `STATION_PENUNJANG` / `STATION_BEDAH` /
    `STATION_KASIR` / `STATION_FARMASI` + `STATIONS` array, `PREFIX_MAP`.
  - `STATUS_WAITING` / `STATUS_CALLED` / `STATUS_IN_PROGRESS` /
    `STATUS_COMPLETED` / `STATUS_CANCELLED` + `ACTIVE_STATUSES` array.
  - Scopes: `today()`, `byStation($s)`, `active()`, `waiting()`.
  - Helper: `Queue::prefixFor($station)`.

- **`backend/app/Http/Controllers/QueueController.php`** ‚Äî endpoint generic
  `/v1/antrian/*` (lihat Section 5.1b). Tidak menerapkan gate per-station
  (gate ada di QueueService); cocok untuk admin tooling & TV display.

- **Per-station service (`AdmisiService`, `PerawatService`, `RefraksiService`,
  `DokterService`, `PenunjangService`, `BedahService`, `FarmasiService`,
  `KasirService`)** ‚Äî `selesaiAntrian` (atau `selesaiAdmisi`) hanya thin
  wrapper yang:
  1. Pre-validate gate spesifik domain (mis. `PerawatService::selesaiAntrian`
     cek `NurseAssessment::is_finalized=true` sebelum advance).
  2. Delegate ke `$this->queueService->advanceFromStation($queueId, $station)`.

- **`AdmisiService::registerVisit($data)` ‚Äî DIRECT ADMISI (revisi 4, 2026-05-26)**:
  Pasien yang datang langsung ke loket (bukan dari kiosk) di-proses petugas
  via form lengkap. Service SKIP `createAntrianAdmisi` sepenuhnya:
  1. Buat Visit dengan `current_station = 'TRIASE'` (bukan ADMISI).
  2. Generate satu `sharedNumber` via `queueService->generateQueueNumber('TRIASE')`
     ‚Üí format `TR-NNN`.
  3. `enqueue($visit->id, 'TRIASE', $sharedNumber)` + `enqueue($visit->id,
     'REFRAKSIONIS', $sharedNumber)` paralel ‚Äî keduanya share `TR-NNN`.
  4. Tidak ada `Queue` station=ADMISI yang tercipta untuk visit ini.

  Konsekuensi:
  - Endpoint `GET /admisi/antrian` (queue ADMISI WAITING/CALLED) **tidak**
    menampilkan pasien direct daftar ‚Äî list itu hanya untuk walk-in kiosk
    yang belum di-`daftarkanWalkIn`.
  - Endpoint `GET /admisi/kunjungan` (tabel "Seluruh Kunjungan Hari Ini")
    **tetap** menampilkan visit-nya ‚Äî eager-load `queues` di service tidak
    lagi filter ke ADMISI, dan helper `pickPrimaryQueueNumber($visit)` pilih
    queue TR-NNN sebagai `no_antrian` yang ditampilkan.
  - Walk-in kiosk **tetap** lewat ADMISI queue dulu ‚Äî `daftarkanWalkIn`
    (lihat Section 11.7) yang trigger advance ke TR setelah merge data.

**Catatan operasional:**

- **Transisi TR ‚Üí D**: `nextAfterTriaseOrRefraksi()` cek `is_finalized` di
  kedua tabel `nurse_assessments` & `refraction_records`. Yang **pertama**
  selesai (gate passed) trigger enqueue DOKTER. Yang **kedua** selesai
  setelahnya return `NO_OP` (cek `DOKTER` queue sudah ada hari ini) ‚Üí
  tutup queue partner tanpa double-enqueue.
- **Transisi D ‚Üí B (BEDAH)**: hanya kalau `DoctorExamination.planning='BEDAH'`
  **DAN** `SurgerySchedule.scheduled_date = today()` **DAN**
  `SurgerySchedule.status IN ('SCHEDULED', 'IN_PROGRESS')`. Kalau jadwal di
  masa depan, pasien tetap D ‚Üí K ‚Üí F ‚Üí SELESAI hari ini; saat tanggal
  operasi dia daftar ulang dari ADMISI.
- **Transisi K ‚Üí F vs K ‚Üí SELESAI**: `nextAfterKasir()` cek apakah ada
  `Prescription` status `DRAFT`/`SUBMITTED`/`DISPENSING` untuk visit ini.
- **Reverb broadcast**: `QueueService::broadcastQueueUpdate()` dispatch
  `AdmisiQueueUpdated` untuk station=ADMISI, `TriaseQueueUpdated` untuk
  TRIASE/REFRAKSIONIS. Station lain belum punya event class ‚Äî fallback
  polling 30s di frontend.
- **BPJS ‚Äî kiosk dengan kode booking / no rujukan** (tahap 1):
  `AdmisiService` validasi booking/rujukan via VClaim, lalu langsung
  enqueue TRIASE + REFRAKSIONIS (skip ADMISI). Jika
  `integration_configs.bpjs_enabled=true`, service juga POST entry ke
  antrean Dokter di WSBPJS via `BpjsAntreanService` untuk sinkronisasi
  antrean BPJS.
- **Cancel di tengah alur**: `PUT /admisi/kunjungan/{id}/cancel` (soft
  delete visit) atau `PUT /antrian/{id}/batal` per baris queue. Cancel
  visit men-cascade ke semua queue (soft delete).

### 11.5 Tampilan Real-Time di `AntreanTVView.vue`

`AntreanTVView.vue` adalah **public display** (route `/antrean-tv`, no auth,
layout blank ‚Äî lihat Section 6.3) yang dipasang di TV ruang tunggu.

- Snapshot semua station satu request: `GET /api/v1/antrian` (lihat Section
  5.1b) ‚Üí response berisi `prefix`, `total`, `waiting`, `called`, `next`,
  `rows` per station.
- Subscribe ke channel Reverb untuk station yang sudah punya event class
  (`A`, `T/R`) via `pusher-js`. Station lain (D/P/B/K/F) belum broadcast ‚Äî
  rely pada polling.
- Fallback: polling `GET /api/v1/antrian` tiap 30 detik (sama dengan
  `queueStore.startPolling`).
- Tampilkan **nomor antrean yang sedang dipanggil** per station (`called`),
  plus nomor next-in-line (`next`).
- Saat ada nomor baru dipanggil, trigger animasi blink (`@keyframes blink`
  di `assets/styles/base.css`) + opsional Text-to-Speech / suara panggilan.

### 11.6 Catatan Operasional Alur

- **Antrean TR (paralel)**: 2 baris `queues` per visit dengan
  `station=TRIASE` dan `station=REFRAKSIONIS`, share `visit_id`. Perawat
  (`PerawatView`) buka antrean TRIASE; refraksionis (`RefraksionisView`)
  buka antrean REFRAKSIONIS. Siapa yang selesai duluan trigger enqueue
  DOKTER (jika gate AND passed); yang selesai berikutnya cuma menutup
  queue partner (`NO_OP`).
- **BPJS bridging off**: jika konfigurasi `bpjs_enabled = false`, alur
  WS RS tetap sama (kiosk ‚Üí TR via validasi booking jika tersedia, atau
  via Admisi manual), hanya **tidak ada POST ke antrean Dokter di WSBPJS**
  ‚Äî sinkronisasi antrean BPJS dilakukan offline / manual.
- **Cancel di tengah alur**: gunakan
  `PUT /admisi/kunjungan/{id}/cancel` ‚Äî semua antrean turunan di-mark
  `DIBATALKAN` dan tidak muncul lagi di TV.
- **Lewati (skip)**: hanya di tahap TR
  (`PUT /perawat/antrian/{id}/lewati`) ‚Äî pasien tidak hilang, hanya turun
  ke urutan paling bawah. Tidak ada `lewati` di Kasir/Farmasi (wajib
  selesai berurutan).

### 11.7 Anjungan Mandiri (Kiosk Walk-In) ‚Äî Detail Flow

Kiosk publik (`AnjunganView.vue` di route `/anjungan`, no auth) untuk pasien
self-service. **Saat ini hanya alur UMUM yang fully wired**; alur BPJS masih
UI mock (TODO: integrasi VClaim).

**Alur lengkap pasien Umum:**

```
1. Pasien tap "Umum / Pasien Baru" di kiosk
   ‚Üì
   POST /api/v1/anjungan/tiket-umum  (public, no auth)
   ‚Üì
   Backend transaction:
   ‚Ä¢ Patient placeholder { name: "Belum Terdaftar", nik: "9XXXX...", no_rm: auto-generated }
   ‚Ä¢ Visit { guarantor_type: UMUM, classification: Baru, current_station: ADMISI }
   ‚Ä¢ Queue { station: ADMISI, status: WAITING, queue_number: A-NNN }
   ‚Ä¢ broadcast AdmisiQueueUpdated('added') ‚Üí channel admisi-queue
   ‚Üì
   Response: { queue_number, queue_id, visit_id, patient_id, no_rm, station }
   ‚Üì
   Kiosk cetak tiket "A-NNN ‚Äî Loket Admisi"
   ‚Üì (auto-reset 15 detik)

2. AdmisiView (admin) terima via WS / polling 30s:
   ‚Ä¢ Row muncul di "Siap Dipanggil" dengan badge WALK-IN
   ‚Ä¢ Info: "Belum Terdaftar ‚Äî Pasien dari Anjungan Mandiri"
   ‚Ä¢ Aksi: [Daftarkan (disabled)] [Panggil]
   ‚Üì

3. Admin klik [Panggil] ‚Üí PUT /admisi/antrian/{id}/panggil
   ‚Ä¢ Queue status: WAITING ‚Üí CALLED
   ‚Ä¢ broadcast queue-updated (AntreanTV update + suara)
   ‚Ä¢ Tombol berubah: [Daftarkan (enabled)] [Panggil Ulang]
   ‚Üì (admin boleh klik Panggil Ulang berkali-kali ‚Äî same endpoint, update called_at)

4. Admin klik [Daftarkan]:
   ‚Ä¢ Wizard 3-step terbuka dengan banner kuning "Mendaftarkan antrean A-NNN"
   ‚Ä¢ Mode: Pasien Lama (search 1 char, preview Nama-RM-Alamat) atau Pasien Baru
   ‚Ä¢ Submit ‚Üí PUT /admisi/kunjungan/{visitId}/daftarkan-walkin
   ‚Üì

5. Backend daftarkanWalkIn() ‚Äî DB transaction + lockForUpdate:
   ‚Ä¢ Validasi: queue masih CALLED, patient.name='Belum Terdaftar', current_station=ADMISI
   ‚Ä¢ Skenario A (patient_id ada ‚Äî pasien lama):
     - visit.patient_id = pasien_lama.id
     - placeholder Patient soft-deleted
   ‚Ä¢ Skenario B (data baru):
     - Cek NIK unique (exclude placeholder itself)
     - Update placeholder dgn data real (NIK, nama, gender, DOB, dll). no_rm tetap.
   ‚Ä¢ Update Visit (insurer_id, classification, guarantor_type, bpjs_*, registered_by_id)
   ‚Ä¢ Auto-advance: queueService->advanceFromStation(admisiQueue, 'ADMISI')
     ‚Üí queue ADMISI: COMPLETED
     ‚Üí enqueue TRIASE + REFRAKSIONIS (paralel)
     ‚Üí visit.current_station = 'TRIASE'
   ‚Ä¢ Log: DAFTAR_WALKIN
   ‚Üì

6. AdmisiView refresh:
   ‚Ä¢ Row berubah: badge sekarang UMUM/BPJS sesuai pilihan, nama real
   ‚Ä¢ Status pill: "Triase" (ungu) ‚Äî pasien sudah lanjut, tidak di Siap Dipanggil lagi
   ‚Ä¢ Tetap visible di tabel "Seluruh Kunjungan Hari Ini"
```

**Tombol Edit Pasien** (card Siap Dipanggil, hanya untuk pasien NON walk-in):
- Buka modal kecil ‚Äî Nama / NIK (readonly) / JK / DOB / Phone / Alamat
- Submit ‚Üí `PUT /admisi/pasien/{id}` (endpoint existing)
- Store sync data ke `antrian[].visit.patient` & `visits[].patient` lokal

**Cancel Kunjungan** (tombol trash merah di tabel):
- Sebelumnya restricted ke station=ADMISI saja
- **Sekarang boleh dari station mana pun kecuali SELESAI** ‚Äî admin punya
  kontrol penuh untuk cancel mid-flow
- Confirm dialog include warning ekstra kalau pasien sudah di luar ADMISI
- Backend: cascade queue aktif (WAITING/CALLED/IN_PROGRESS) ‚Üí CANCELLED,
  Visit soft-deleted
- Frontend store handle 404 sebagai sukses (idempotent ‚Äî kalau visit sudah
  trashed dari race condition / stale state, anggap selesai)

**Zombie-row protection**:
- `getAntrian()` di backend: `whereHas('visit')` excludes queue dengan visit
  soft-deleted (terjadi saat queue COMPLETED dari advance tapi visit lalu
  di-cancel)
- Frontend safety net: `mappedAntrian.filter(q => q.visit != null)` di
  AdmisiView computed

# Arumed Apps ‚Äî Database Schema Skill

## Overview

Database schema untuk **Arumed Apps** ‚Äî sistem manajemen klinik mata (FKRTL Klinik Utama Mata).

- **Database:** PostgreSQL
- **Backend:** Laravel 11
- **Total Tables:** 28 tabel
- **Primary Key:** UUID di semua tabel
- **Soft Delete:** `deleted_at` di semua tabel utama
- **Timestamps:** `created_at`, `updated_at` di semua tabel

---

## Aturan Penting

1. **UUID** sebagai primary key (`gen_random_uuid()`)
2. **Soft delete** ‚Äî jangan `DELETE`, gunakan `deleted_at = NOW()`
3. **Migration order** harus diikuti (foreign key dependency)
4. **JSONB** untuk data flexible (diagnosis sekunder, tindakan, hasil penunjang)
5. **is_finalized** ‚Äî jika TRUE, record dikunci, tidak bisa diedit
6. **Semua field OD/OS** di tabel mata (kecuali PD dan clinical notes = shared)

### Follow-up Feature (Kontrol Ulang)

> **Planning enum does NOT change.** Follow-up is optional scheduling within `PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN`.
> No auto-queue or auto-visit generation. Data is for tracking and reporting only.

#### Field Mapping

| Field | Source | Description |
|-------|--------|-------------|
| `visits.planning_follow_up` | Set TRUE when doctor fills `follow_up_date`; FALSE when left empty | Derived flag ‚Äî do NOT set manually |
| `visits.follow_up_date` | Doctor input in Tab 4 planning section (optional) | Target return date; if filled ‚Üí triggers follow-up flow |
| `visits.follow_up_reason` | Auto-generated from diagnosis or manually entered by doctor | Reason, e.g. "Recheck visus", "Post-op assessment" |

#### Usage Scenarios

**Use Case 1 ‚Äî Admin Dashboard: "Pasien Kontrol Hari Ini"**
```sql
SELECT * FROM visits
WHERE follow_up_date = CURRENT_DATE
  AND planning_follow_up = TRUE
  AND deleted_at IS NULL;
-- Purpose: Show list of patients who should return today
```

**Use Case 2 ‚Äî Admin Dashboard: "Pasien Kontrol Minggu Ini"**
```sql
SELECT * FROM visits
WHERE follow_up_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND planning_follow_up = TRUE
  AND deleted_at IS NULL;
-- Purpose: Remind staff about upcoming follow-ups
```

**Use Case 3 ‚Äî Analytics/Reporting: "Follow-ups per Month"**
```sql
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('month', follow_up_date) AS month,
  guarantor_type,
  COUNT(*) AS total_follow_ups
FROM visits
WHERE planning_follow_up = TRUE
  AND deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', follow_up_date), guarantor_type
ORDER BY month DESC;
-- Purpose: Track follow-up appointment trends per penjamin
```

#### Constraints

```
- follow_up_date >= CURRENT_DATE (if not NULL)
- follow_up_date filled ‚Üí planning_follow_up = TRUE (auto)
- follow_up_date empty  ‚Üí planning_follow_up = FALSE (auto)
- follow_up_reason should be non-empty when follow_up_date is set
- planning enum stays: PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN / BEDAH / RUJUK (no new value)
```

#### Auto-Populate Logic

When doctor fills `follow_up_date` (within `PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN` planning):

```php
// 1. visits table follow-up fields are populated; planning_follow_up mirrors whether date is set
$visit->update([
    'planning_follow_up' => $request->filled('follow_up_date'),
    'follow_up_date'     => $request->follow_up_date,   // NULL if not filled
    'follow_up_reason'   => $request->follow_up_reason,
]);

// 2. medical_resumes.resume_p auto-appends follow-up details
$resume->update([
    'resume_p' => $resume->resume_p . "\nKontrol Ulang: {$visit->follow_up_date} ‚Äî {$visit->follow_up_reason}",
]);

// 3. If guarantor_type = 'BPJS': create bpjs_control_letters (DRAFT)
if ($visit->guarantor_type === 'BPJS') {
    BpjsControlLetter::create([
        'visit_id'      => $visit->id,
        'tgl_kontrol'   => $visit->follow_up_date,
        'status'        => 'DRAFT',
    ]);
}

// 4. medical_records: create "Surat Kontrol" document (type: FOLLOW_UP_LETTER)
PatientDocument::create([
    'visit_id'            => $visit->id,
    'patient_id'          => $visit->patient_id,
    'document_type_code'  => 'FOLLOW_UP_LETTER',
    'status'              => 'DRAFT',
]);
// NOTE: No auto-queue or auto-visit creation. Follow-up data is tracking/reporting only.
```

## Soft Delete Pattern (Laravel)

```php
// Di setiap Model:
use SoftDeletes;

// Query otomatis exclude deleted:
Patient::all();                    // Hanya aktif
Patient::withTrashed()->all();     // Termasuk deleted
Patient::onlyTrashed()->all();     // Hanya deleted

// Soft delete:
$patient->delete();                // Set deleted_at = NOW()

// Restore:
$patient->restore();               // Set deleted_at = NULL
```

## Finalization Pattern

```php
// Setelah finalized, record TIDAK BISA diedit
// Implementasi di Model atau Service:

public function finalize(string $id, string $employeeId): void
{
    $record = Model::findOrFail($id);

    if ($record->is_finalized) {
        throw new \Exception('Record sudah dikunci, tidak bisa diubah.');
    }

    $record->update([
        'is_finalized'    => true,
        'finalized_at'    => now(),
        'finalized_by_id' => $employeeId,
    ]);
}
```

```php
// Di NurseAssessmentService:
public function calculateBMI(float $bb, float $tb): float
{
    // TB dalam cm ‚Üí konversi ke meter
    $tbMeter = $tb / 100;
    return round($bb / ($tbMeter * $tbMeter), 2);
```

## Queue Number Format

```php
// Generate queue number per station per hari:
// Format: {prefix}-{sequence 3 digit}
// Contoh: A-001, T-005, R-012, D-003

public function generateQueueNumber(string $station): string
{
    $prefix = match($station) {
        'ADMISI'       => 'A',
        'TRIASE'       => 'T',
        'REFRAKSIONIS' => 'R',
        'DOKTER'       => 'D',
        'BEDAH'        => 'B',
        'FARMASI'      => 'F',
        'KASIR'        => 'K',
        default        => 'X',
    };

    $lastQueue = Queue::whereDate('created_at', today())
        ->where('station', $station)
        ->max('queue_sequence') ?? 0;

    $sequence = $lastQueue + 1;

    return [
        'queue_prefix'   => $prefix,
        'queue_sequence' => $sequence,
        'queue_number'   => $prefix . '-' . str_pad($sequence, 3, '0', STR_PAD_LEFT),
    ];
}
```

## Medical Resume Auto-Generate

```php
// Di MedicalResumeService:
public function generateResume(string $visitId, string $doctorId): MedicalResume
{
    $visit      = Visit::with(['nurseAssessment', 'refractionRecord', 'doctorExamination', 'diagnosticResults'])->findOrFail($visitId);
    $doctor     = $visit->doctorExamination;
    $refraction = $visit->refractionRecord;

    // S: dari anamnese dokter
    $s = $doctor->anamnese ?? '-';

    // O: dari data refraksionis (auto-populate)
    $o = "Visus OD: {$refraction->visus_akhir_od}, OS: {$refraction->visus_akhir_os}. "
       . "IOP OD: {$refraction->iop_od} mmHg, OS: {$refraction->iop_os} mmHg. "
       . "Autoref OD: S{$refraction->autoref_od_sph} C{$refraction->autoref_od_cyl} X{$refraction->autoref_od_axis}";

    // A: dari ICD-10
    $a = $doctor->diagnosis_utama . ' ' . implode(', ', $doctor->diagnosis_sekunder ?? []);

    // P: dari ICD-9 + planning
    $p = implode(', ', $doctor->tindakan_codes ?? []) . '. Planning: ' . $doctor->planning;

    // Hasil penunjang (dari diagnostic_results yang sudah selesai)
    $penunjang = $visit->diagnosticResults->map(fn($r) => [
        'test_type' => $r->order->test_type,
        'result'    => $r->expertise_data,
        'date'      => $r->uploaded_at,
    ])->toArray();

    return MedicalResume::create([
        'visit_id'          => $visitId,
        'doctor_id'         => $doctorId,
        'resume_s'          => $s,
        'resume_o'          => $o,
        'resume_a'          => $a,
        'resume_p'          => $p,
        'penunjang_results' => $penunjang,
        'is_editable'       => true,
        'generated_at'      => now(),
    ]);
}
```

## Alur Stasiun

```
ADMISI
  ‚Üì
TRIASE & REFRAKSIONIS ‚Üê PARALLEL, urutan BEBAS
  ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Bisa Triase dulu ‚Üí Refraksionis
  ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Bisa Refraksionis dulu ‚Üí Triase
  ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Keduanya is_finalized=TRUE
        ‚Üí visits.ready_for_doctor = TRUE (otomatis)
        ‚Üí Auto buat antrian DOKTER
  ‚Üì
DOKTER (hanya setelah KEDUANYA selesai)
  ‚Üì
PENUNJANG (opsional, dari order dokter)
  ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Selesai ‚Üí kembali ke antrian DOKTER
  ‚Üì
BEDAH (jika planning=BEDAH)
  ‚Üì
FARMASI ‚Üí KASIR ‚Üí SELESAI
```

### Logic Auto Queue ke Dokter
```php
// Trigger saat nurse_assessments ATAU refraction_records di-finalize
// Cek apakah keduanya sudah selesai:

$triaseSelesai  = NurseAssessment::where('visit_id', $id)
                    ->where('is_finalized', true)->exists();
$refraksiSelesai = RefractionRecord::where('visit_id', $id)
                    ->where('is_finalized', true)->exists();

if ($triaseSelesai && $refraksiSelesai) {
    $visit->update([
        'ready_for_doctor' => true,
        'triase_completed_at'  => $visit->triase_completed_at ?? now(),
        'refraksi_completed_at' => $visit->refraksi_completed_at ?? now(),
    ]);
    // Auto buat antrian dokter
    app(QueueService::class)->createQueue($visit->id, 'DOKTER');
}
```

### Queue Prefix per Stasiun
```
A = ADMISI
T = TRIASE
R = REFRAKSIONIS
D = DOKTER
B = BEDAH
F = FARMASI
K = KASIR
```

### Klasifikasi Kunjungan
```
Baru / Pre-Op / Post-Op / Kontrol
```

### Planning Dokter
```
PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN (dengan atau tanpa Kontrol Ulang)  ‚Üê opsional follow-up
BEDAH
RUJUK
```

> Ketika dokter pilih `PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN`, dokter bisa **opsional** mengisi tanggal kontrol ulang:
> - Jika `follow_up_date` diisi ‚Üí sistem mencatat sebagai follow-up appointment (tracking only)
> - Jika `follow_up_date` kosong ‚Üí pasien pulang berobat jalan biasa, tidak ada follow-up scheduled
>
> Follow-up **bukan** planning option terpisah ‚Äî tetap 3 pilihan: PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN / BEDAH / RUJUK

## Alur Pasien per Tipe

### UMUM (Non-Bedah)
```
Admisi (guarantor_type=UMUM)
‚Üí Triase ‚Üí Refraksionis ‚Üí Dokter
‚Üí Planning: PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN
‚Üí Farmasi ‚Üí Kasir (tarif UMUM)
```

### UMUM (Bedah)
```
Admisi ‚Üí Triase ‚Üí Refraksionis ‚Üí Dokter
‚Üí Planning: BEDAH
‚Üí Penunjang Biometri ‚Üí IOL recommendation
‚Üí Bedah (request BHP+IOL ke Farmasi)
‚Üí Farmasi ‚Üí Kasir (tarif UMUM)
```

### BPJS (Non-Bedah)
```
Admisi (guarantor_type=BPJS)
‚Üí Generate SEP via VClaim
‚Üí Validasi rujukan (bpjs_referrals_in)
‚Üí Triase ‚Üí Refraksionis ‚Üí Dokter
‚Üí ICD-10 + ICD-9 CM (untuk klaim)
‚Üí Farmasi (obat FORNAS) ‚Üí Kasir (tarif BPJS)
‚Üí Klaim: INA-CBGs grouping ‚Üí LUPIS ‚Üí VClaim submit
```

### BPJS (Bedah)
```
Sama seperti BPJS Non-Bedah +
‚Üí Bedah: BHP+IOL request ke Farmasi
‚Üí IOL usage dicatat (surgery_iol_usage)
‚Üí Klaim: include BHP+IOL di billing
```

### RUJUK
```
Dokter planning=RUJUK
‚Üí POST VClaim ‚Üí dapat nomor rujukan keluar
‚Üí Generate Surat Rujukan (patient_documents)
‚Üí Farmasi ‚Üí Kasir
```

### KONTROL BPJS
```
Admisi input no_surat_kontrol
‚Üí GET VClaim ‚Üí validasi SC
‚Üí Alur normal (tanpa rujukan baru)
```

### PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN + Kontrol Ulang (Opsional)
```
PATH 1 ‚Äî Dengan Follow-up:
Dokter Tab 4 ‚Üí planning = PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN
‚Üí Dokter isi follow_up_date + follow_up_reason (opsional)
‚Üí System: visits.planning_follow_up = TRUE
‚Üí medical_resume.resume_p di-append info kontrol ulang
‚Üí Jika BPJS: bpjs_control_letters dibuat (DRAFT)
‚Üí Surat Kontrol dibuat di medical_records
‚Üí Farmasi ‚Üí Kasir ‚Üí SELESAI
‚Üí Admin dashboard dapat melihat pasien yang akan kontrol

PATH 2 ‚Äî Tanpa Follow-up:
Dokter Tab 4 ‚Üí planning = PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN
‚Üí follow_up_date dikosongkan
‚Üí System: visits.planning_follow_up = FALSE
‚Üí Alur normal biasa
‚Üí Farmasi ‚Üí Kasir ‚Üí SELESAI
```

> **Catatan:** Ketika pasien datang kembali, tetap melalui alur normal Admisi ‚Üí Triase ‚Üí Dokter ‚Üí Kasir.
> Tidak ada auto-queue atau auto-visit generation.

## Keputusan Arsitektur Penting

### Follow-up Feature (Kontrol Ulang) ‚Äî Optional Scheduling

#### Apa itu Kontrol Ulang

- **BUKAN** planning option baru ‚Äî planning enum tetap 3: `PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN / BEDAH / RUJUK`
- **ADALAH** scheduling opsional di dalam `PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN`
- Dokter mengisi `follow_up_date` ‚Üí pasien di-schedule follow-up appointment
- Dokter kosongkan `follow_up_date` ‚Üí pasien pulang biasa, tidak ada follow-up

#### Cara Kerja di Tab 4

```
Dokter Tab 4 ‚Äî Planning Section:
1. Pilih planning = PULANG_BEROBAT_JALAN
2. (Opsional) Isi tanggal kontrol ulang (follow_up_date)
3. (Opsional) Isi alasan kontrol ulang (follow_up_reason)
4. Save

Jika follow_up_date DIISI:
‚îú‚îÄ visits.planning_follow_up = TRUE  (auto)
‚îú‚îÄ visits.follow_up_date = tanggal yang diisi
‚îú‚îÄ visits.follow_up_reason = alasan yang diisi
‚îú‚îÄ medical_resume.resume_p di-append info kontrol
‚îú‚îÄ Jika BPJS ‚Üí bpjs_control_letters dibuat (DRAFT)
‚îî‚îÄ Surat Kontrol dibuat di medical_records (type: FOLLOW_UP_LETTER)

Jika follow_up_date KOSONG:
‚îú‚îÄ visits.planning_follow_up = FALSE  (auto)
‚îú‚îÄ Tidak ada follow-up scheduling
‚îî‚îÄ Normal "pulang berobat jalan" workflow
```

#### Siapa yang Bisa Pakai Follow-up

```
Semua tipe penjamin:
- BPJS       ‚Üí Follow-up + Surat Kontrol resmi (submit ke VClaim)
- UMUM       ‚Üí Follow-up + Surat Kontrol internal
- ASURANSI   ‚Üí Follow-up + Surat Kontrol internal
- PERUSAHAAN ‚Üí Follow-up + Surat Kontrol internal
- SOSIAL     ‚Üí Follow-up + Surat Kontrol internal
- COB        ‚Üí Follow-up + Surat Kontrol internal (penjamin utama)

Logika follow-up sama untuk semua.
Perbedaan: BPJS dapat Surat Kontrol formal yang bisa di-submit ke VClaim.
```

#### Struktur Data

```
visits table ‚Äî 3 kolom opsional (hanya terisi jika follow-up dijadwalkan):
  planning_follow_up  BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE  ‚Üê derived, jangan set manual
  follow_up_date      DATE NULL              ‚Üê trigger utama follow-up flow
  follow_up_reason    TEXT NULL              ‚Üê alasan kontrol
```

#### Tidak Ada Auto-Queue

```
Ketika pasien datang kembali di tanggal follow_up_date:
‚Üí Pasien daftar ulang seperti biasa di Admisi
‚Üí Alur normal: Admisi ‚Üí Triase ‚Üí Refraksionis ‚Üí Dokter ‚Üí Farmasi ‚Üí Kasir
‚Üí Tidak ada antrian otomatis, tidak ada kunjungan otomatis dibuat
‚Üí Pasien bisa dihubungi terlebih dahulu via SMS/WhatsApp (manual oleh staf)
```

### Follow-up Dashboard & Reporting

#### Use Case 1 ‚Äî "Pasien Kontrol Hari Ini"

```
Tujuan: Menampilkan pasien yang seharusnya kontrol hari ini
Lokasi: Admin/Kasir Dashboard widget
Data:   no_rm, nama, follow_up_date, follow_up_reason, dokter_sebelumnya

Query:
SELECT v.*, p.no_rm, p.nama
FROM visits v JOIN patients p ON v.patient_id = p.id
WHERE v.follow_up_date = CURRENT_DATE
  AND v.planning_follow_up = TRUE
  AND v.deleted_at IS NULL;

UI: List atau card view, sortable
Action: Kasir notifikasi pasien, siapkan berkas
```

#### Use Case 2 ‚Äî "Pasien Kontrol Minggu Ini"

```
Tujuan: Forecast follow-up yang akan datang dalam 7 hari ke depan
Lokasi: Admin Dashboard widget
Data:   no_rm, nama, follow_up_date, hari_tersisa, follow_up_reason

Query:
SELECT v.*, p.no_rm, p.nama,
       (v.follow_up_date - CURRENT_DATE) AS hari_tersisa
FROM visits v JOIN patients p ON v.patient_id = p.id
WHERE v.follow_up_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND v.planning_follow_up = TRUE
  AND v.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY v.follow_up_date ASC;

UI: List dengan indikator "N hari lagi"
Action: Kirim reminder SMS/WhatsApp (opsional, manual)
```

#### Use Case 3 ‚Äî "Follow-up Statistics"

```
Tujuan: Insight manajemen klinik ‚Äî tren dan volume follow-up
Lokasi: Analytics/Laporan Dashboard
Metrik:
  - Total follow-up per bulan
  - Follow-up per tipe penjamin (BPJS vs non-BPJS)
  - Rata-rata jarak hari (visit awal ‚Üí follow_up_date)

Query:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', follow_up_date) AS bulan,
       guarantor_type,
       COUNT(*) AS total_follow_up
FROM visits
WHERE planning_follow_up = TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', follow_up_date), guarantor_type
ORDER BY bulan DESC;

UI: Chart + tabel, exportable CSV/Excel
```

### Follow-up & BPJS Integration

#### Pasien BPJS + follow_up_date DIISI

```
1. bpjs_control_letters dibuat otomatis (status: DRAFT)
   Isi Surat Kontrol:
   - Data pasien: NIK, no_rm, nama
   - Data kunjungan: no_sep
   - Tanggal kontrol: visits.follow_up_date
   - Alasan: visits.follow_up_reason

2. Dokter/Admin review dan tanda tangan Surat Kontrol
```

#### Pasien Non-BPJS (UMUM, ASURANSI, dll) + follow_up_date DIISI

```
   - status: DRAFT
2. Tidak ada submit ke API BPJS
3. Dokumen untuk arsip klinik saja
```

#### Semua Pasien + follow_up_date KOSONG

```
1. Tidak ada dokumen follow-up yang dibuat
2. Tidak ada integrasi BPJS diperlukan
3. Alur normal "pulang berobat jalan" biasa
```

## Master Data Module ‚Äî Frontend Architecture

> **Status (2026-05-20):** Phase 1 complete (Tarif + Paket Bedah). Phases 2‚Äì5 still inline in `MasterDataView.vue`.

### Sub-module split plan

The parent `arumed-frontend/src/views/MasterDataView.vue` owns the top-level nav, in-page submenu strip, RBAC, and toast bus. Each section is being extracted into its own sub-component file. Phases are executed one at a time, never bundled:

| Phase | File | Sections it owns | Status |
|------|------|------------------|--------|
| 1 | `MasterDataTarifView.vue` | Master Tarif (`procedures` + `procedure_tariffs`), Paket Bedah (`surgery_packages`) | ‚úÖ done |
| 2 | `MasterDataRMEView.vue` | Template Form RME (`document_types`, `document_templates`, `station_document_mappings`) | ‚è≥ pending |
| 3 | `MasterDataAdministrasiView.vue` | Data Administrasi (provinsi/kabupaten/kecamatan/kelurahan) + Clinic Profile (`clinic_profiles`) | ‚è≥ pending |
| 4 | `MasterDataICDView.vue` | ICD-10 + ICD-9 CM (`icd10_codes`, `icd9_codes`) | ‚è≥ pending |
| 5 | `MasterDataObatAlkesBHPIOLView.vue` | Obat (`medications`), BHP (`bhp_items`), IOL (`iol_items`), Alkes | ‚è≥ pending |

### Component contract for sub-modules

Each sub-module file follows the same shape:

```js
const props = defineProps({
  mode: { type: String, required: true, validator: (v) => [...].includes(v) },
})
const emit = defineEmits(['toast'])
function toast(type, msg) { emit('toast', { type, msg }) }
```

- The parent passes `mode` so a single file can host multiple related tabs (e.g. MasterDataTarifView with `mode='tarif'` vs `'paket'`).
- The parent renders it as `<MasterDataXxxView :mode="currentSection==='X' ? 'a' : 'b'" @toast="(p)=>toast(p.type,p.msg)" />` and only when `currentSection` matches one of the sub-module's sections.
- The sub-module owns its own modals, action buttons (Tambah/Edit/Delete), filters, fetch state, and CSS. It does **not** touch the parent nav.
- `defineExpose({ openNew*, refresh })` is optional; expose only when the parent needs imperative access (rarely).

### RBAC integration (already in MasterDataView)

Hardcoded permission map in `MasterDataView.vue` script setup:

```js
const menus = [
  { id: 'tarif',    label: 'Master Tarif',    section: 'tarif',   roles: ['superadmin', 'kasir'] },
  { id: 'paket',    label: 'Paket Bedah',     section: 'paket',   roles: ['superadmin', 'dokter'] },
  { id: 'rme',      label: 'Template RME',    section: 'rme',     roles: ['superadmin'] },
  { id: 'icd10',    label: 'ICD-10',          section: 'icd',     roles: ['superadmin', 'dokter'] },
  { id: 'icd9',     label: 'ICD-9 CM',        section: 'icd',     roles: ['superadmin', 'dokter'] },
  { id: 'admin',    label: 'Administrasi',    section: 'admin',   roles: ['superadmin', 'admisi'] },
  { id: 'bhp',      label: 'BHP',             section: 'farmasi', roles: ['superadmin', 'farmasi'] },
  { id: 'iol',      label: 'IOL',             section: 'farmasi', roles: ['superadmin', 'farmasi'] },
  { id: 'obat-kat', label: 'Kategori Obat',   section: 'farmasi', roles: ['superadmin', 'farmasi'] },
  { id: 'alkes',    label: 'Alkes',           section: 'farmasi', roles: ['superadmin'] },
]
```

`canAccess(menuId)` does case-insensitive match against `authStore.roleName`. `accessibleSections` filters the top-nav. `activeSubmenus` filters the sub-nav strip below it (only shown when current section has >1 accessible leaf). On mount and on role change, `syncMenuForRole()` jumps to the first accessible leaf, or shows the "Tidak ada akses" empty state if none.

**Single chokepoint** to migrate to real backend permissions later: swap the `m.roles.includes(role)` check inside `canAccess()` for a call to a future `permissionsStore.has('master_data.X.view')`.

### Per-guarantor tariff model (Phase 1)

The tariff UX is driven by the backend's existing `procedure_tariffs` schema:

```
procedure_tariffs:
  procedure_id    (uuid, FK procedures)
  insurer_id      (uuid, FK insurers, NULL for UMUM/BPJS)
  classification  (UMUM | BPJS | ASURANSI | PERUSAHAAN | SOSIAL)
  price           (decimal)
  is_active       (bool)
```

UMUM and BPJS are built-in with `insurer_id = NULL`. ASURANSI/PERUSAHAAN/SOSIAL classifications **must** carry an `insurer_id` referencing an `insurers` record.

Frontend builds a composite "guarantor list":

```js
const guarantors = computed(() => [
  { key: 'UMUM|null', label: 'Umum',  classification: 'UMUM', insurer_id: null },
  { key: 'BPJS|null', label: 'BPJS',  classification: 'BPJS', insurer_id: null },
  ...insurers.value.map((i) => ({
    key: `${i.type}|${i.id}`,
    label: `${typeLabel(i.type)}: ${i.name}`,    // "Asuransi: Sinarmas"
    classification: i.type,
    insurer_id: i.id,
  })),
])
```

`tarifMap` is indexed `[procedureId][${classification}|${insurer_id ?? 'null'}]` so any (procedure, guarantor) combination is addressable in O(1).

**List view** uses a single "Penjamin: [‚ñæ]" dropdown. Switching it re-binds the Tarif column client-side (no fetch).

**Edit modal** renders every guarantor as its own input row. On save the component sequentially upserts each row:

- empty + existing id ‚Üí `DELETE /master/tarif/tindakan/{id}`
- filled + existing id ‚Üí `PUT  /master/tarif/tindakan/{id}` (only `price` accepted)
- filled + no id ‚Üí `POST /master/tarif/tindakan` with `procedure_id`, `insurer_id`, `classification`, `price`

This is N+1 in HTTP calls. If insurers grow large, add a batch endpoint `POST /master/tarif/tindakan/batch` accepting an array of upserts.

### Frontend API surface (`arumed-frontend/src/services/api.js`)

```js
export const masterApi = {
  penjamin: () => api.get('/master/penjamin'),
  tindakan: {
    list:   (params)   => api.get('/master/tindakan', { params }),
    create: (data)     => api.post('/master/tindakan', data),
    update: (id, data) => api.put(`/master/tindakan/${id}`, data),
    remove: (id)       => api.delete(`/master/tindakan/${id}`),
  },
  paketBedah: { list, create, update, remove },     // /master/paket-bedah
  tarifTindakan: { list, create, update, remove },  // /master/tarif/tindakan
}
```

Phase 2+ should extend `masterApi` with `jenisDokumen`, `templateDokumen`, `stasiunDokumen`, `icd10`, `icd9`, `obat`, `bhp`, `iol`, and the not-yet-built `wilayah` + `clinicProfile` endpoints.

### Helpers worth keeping in each sub-module

```js
function unwrapList(data) {              // Laravel paginator wrapper handler
  if (Array.isArray(data)) return data
  if (Array.isArray(data?.data)) return data.data
  return []
}
function fmtRp(v) {
  if (v === null || v === undefined || v === '') return '‚Äî'
  return 'Rp ' + Number(v).toLocaleString('id-ID')
}
```

`unwrapList` is required because `/master/*` endpoints return Laravel `LengthAwarePaginator` shape (`{ data: [...], current_page, ... }`) wrapped inside the project's standard `{ success, data, message, errors }` envelope ‚Äî so `res.data?.data?.data` is the array. The helper papers over both shapes.

### Schema gaps surfaced during Phase 1 (do NOT silently ignore in future phases)

The hardcoded mock used to show fields the backend doesn't store. Phase 1 dropped them and matches the schema exactly. Re-introducing them would require backend migrations:

| Mock-only field | Backend status | Decision |
|----------------|----------------|----------|
| `surgery_packages.kategori` (Katarak/Pterigium/...) | not in migration | dropped from UI |
| `surgery_packages.jenis` (BPJS/Umum/Asuransi) | not in migration | dropped ‚Äî handled by per-tariff classification instead, see below |
| `surgery_packages.komponen[]` (line items) | no FK table exists | dropped ‚Äî would need new `surgery_package_items` table |
| `surgery_packages.nilaiBpjs` | only one `price` column | use per-classification tariffs instead |

If/when a future phase wants per-guarantor pricing on paket bedah (same model as tarif), it needs:
- a new migration adding `surgery_package_tariffs` mirroring `procedure_tariffs`, OR
- accepting that `surgery_packages.price` is the single canonical paket price and per-guarantor variants live as separate package entries.

### Insurer paginator caveat

`masterApi.penjamin()` hits `/master/penjamin` which returns Laravel default 15-per-page. Phase 1 currently accepts this. If a clinic has >15 insurers, pass `?per_page=200` (backend already supports the param) or move to a `insurersStore` with proper pagination. Tag this as a TODO when extending.

Saya akan melakukan diving ke setiap poin dengan membaca file-file sumber utama dan melaporkan dengan path serta nomor baris.
Sekarang saya akan membaca file-file kunci untuk setiap poin eksplorasi:
