5	use App\Models\DoctorSchedule;
6	use App\Models\Employee;
7	use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
8	
9	class JadwalDokterService
10	{
11	    // Header kolom CSV import/export (urutan menentukan kolom file).
12	    public const CSV_HEADER = [
13	        'nama_dokter', 'jenis', 'kode_poli', 'nama_poli',
14	        'hari', 'jam_mulai', 'jam_selesai', 'ruang',
15	    ];
16	
17	    // =========================================================================
18	    // LIST
19	    // =========================================================================
20	
21	    /**
22	     * Semua dokter beserta jadwal mereka untuk satu minggu (+ filter layanan).
23	     * Response dikelompokkan per employee agar frontend bisa render per-dokter.
24	     *
25	     * @param  string|null  $weekStart    Senin minggu yang diminta (default: minggu ini)
26	     * @param  string|null  $serviceType  BPJS|EKSEKUTIF (default: semua)
27	     */
28	    public function getAll(?string $weekStart = null, ?string $serviceType = null): array
29	    {
30	        $weekStart = $weekStart ? DoctorSchedule::weekStartFor($weekStart) : DoctorSchedule::currentWeekStart();
31	
32	        $employees = Employee::whereHas('user.role', fn ($q) => $q->where('name', 'dokter'))
33	            ->with(['doctorSchedules' => function ($q) use ($weekStart, $serviceType) {
34	                $q->where('week_start', $weekStart)->orderBy('day_of_week');
35	                if ($serviceType) {
36	                    $q->where('service_type', $serviceType);
37	                }
38	            }])
39	            ->orderBy('name')
40	            ->get();
41	
42	        return $employees->map(fn ($emp) => $this->formatEmployee($emp))->values()->toArray();
43	    }
44	
45	    /**
46	     * Dokter yang jadwalnya aktif hari ini (minggu berjalan + hari sesuai ISO 1-7).
47	     * Dipakai oleh: Admisi dropdown + Antrean TV panel.
48	     */
49	    public function getAktifHariIni(): array
50	    {
51	        $schedules = DoctorSchedule::with('employee')
52	            ->aktifHariIni()
53	            ->orderBy('room')
54	            ->get();
55	
56	        return $schedules->map(fn ($s) => [
57	            'id'           => $s->id,
58	            'employee_id'  => $s->employee_id,
59	            'nama_dokter'  => $s->employee?->name ?? '‚Äî',
60	            'poliklinik'   => $s->poliklinik,
61	            'room'         => $s->room,
62	            'service_type' => $s->service_type,
63	            'queue_prefix' => $s->queuePrefix(),
64	            'start_time'   => $s->start_time,
65	            'end_time'     => $s->end_time,
66	        ])->values()->toArray();
67	    }
68	
69	    /**
70	     * Daftar minggu (week_start) yang sudah punya jadwal, untuk selector minggu.
71	     * Selalu sertakan minggu ini & minggu depan walau belum ada datanya.
72	     */
73	    public function availableWeeks(): array
74	    {
75	        $current = DoctorSchedule::currentWeekStart();
76	        $next    = \Carbon\Carbon::parse($current)->addWeek()->toDateString();
77	
78	        $weeks = DoctorSchedule::query()
79	            ->select('week_start')
80	            ->distinct()
81	            ->orderBy('week_start')
82	            ->pluck('week_start')
83	            ->map(fn ($w) => \Carbon\Carbon::parse($w)->toDateString())
84	            ->all();
85	
86	        $weeks = array_values(array_unique(array_merge($weeks, [$current, $next])));
87	        sort($weeks);
88	
89	        return array_map(fn ($w) => [
90	            'week_start' => $w,
91	            'week_end'   => \Carbon\Carbon::parse($w)->addDays(6)->toDateString(),
92	            'is_current' => $w === $current,
93	        ], $weeks);
94	    }

1	import { defineStore } from 'pinia'
2	import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
3	import { jadwalDokterApi } from '@/services/api'
4	
5	export const useJadwalDokterStore = defineStore('jadwalDokter', () => {
6	  // list semua dokter + jadwal mingguan mereka (dari GET /jadwal-dokter)
7	  const daftarDokter = ref([])
8	  // list jadwal aktif hari ini (dari GET /jadwal-dokter/aktif-hari-ini)
9	  const aktifHariIni = ref([])
10	  // daftar minggu yang bisa dipilih (dari GET /jadwal-dokter/minggu-tersedia)
11	  const availableWeeks = ref([])
12	
13	  // Filter aktif ‚Äî minggu yang sedang ditampilkan & jenis layanan (tab).
14	  // weekStart null = backend pakai minggu berjalan.
15	  const weekStart   = ref(null)
16	  const serviceType = ref('BPJS') // 'BPJS' | 'EKSEKUTIF'
17	
18	  const loading = ref(false)
19	  const error   = ref(null)
20	
21	  // ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Fetch semua (mengikuti weekStart + serviceType aktif) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
22	  async function fetchAll() {
23	    loading.value = true
24	    error.value   = null
25	    try {
26	      const params = {}
27	      if (weekStart.value)   params.week_start   = weekStart.value
28	      if (serviceType.value) params.service_type = serviceType.value
29	      const res = await jadwalDokterApi.list(params)
30	      daftarDokter.value = res.data?.data ?? []
31	    } catch (e) {
32	      error.value = e.response?.data?.message ?? 'Gagal memuat jadwal dokter'
33	    } finally {
34	      loading.value = false
35	    }
36	  }
37	
38	  // ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Fetch daftar minggu ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
39	  async function fetchAvailableWeeks() {
40	    try {
41	      const res = await jadwalDokterApi.availableWeeks()
42	      availableWeeks.value = res.data?.data ?? []
43	      // Default weekStart = minggu berjalan jika belum di-set.
44	      if (!weekStart.value) {
45	        const current = availableWeeks.value.find((w) => w.is_current)
46	        weekStart.value = current?.week_start ?? availableWeeks.value[0]?.week_start ?? null
47	      }
48	    } catch {
49	      availableWeeks.value = []
50	    }
51	  }
52	
53	  // ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Ganti minggu / jenis layanan lalu refetch ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
54	  async function setWeek(ws) {
55	    weekStart.value = ws
56	    await fetchAll()
57	  }
58	
59	  async function setServiceType(type) {
60	    serviceType.value = type
61	    await fetchAll()
62	  }
63	
64	  // ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Fetch aktif hari ini ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
65	  async function fetchAktifHariIni() {
66	    try {
67	      const res = await jadwalDokterApi.aktifHariIni()
68	      aktifHariIni.value = res.data?.data ?? []
69	    } catch {
70	      aktifHariIni.value = []
71	    }
72	  }
73	
74	  // ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ CRUD ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
75	  async function createJadwal(data) {
76	    const res = await jadwalDokterApi.create(data)
77	    await fetchAll()
78	    return res.data?.data
79	  }
80	
81	  async function updateJadwal(id, data) {
82	    const res = await jadwalDokterApi.update(id, data)
83	    await fetchAll()
84	    return res.data?.data
85	  }
86	
87	  async function deleteJadwal(id) {
88	    await jadwalDokterApi.remove(id)
89	    await fetchAll()
90	  }
91	
92	  async function toggleAktif(id) {
93	    const res = await jadwalDokterApi.toggle(id)
94	    // Update in-place untuk responsiveness
95	    const updated = res.data?.data
96	    if (updated) {
97	      daftarDokter.value.forEach((emp) => {
98	        emp.jadwal?.forEach((j) => {
99	          if (j.id === id) j.is_active = updated.is_active
100	        })
101	      })
102	      // Refresh aktif hari ini
103	      await fetchAktifHariIni()
104	    }
105	    return updated
106	  }
107	
108	  // ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Salin ke minggu depan ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
109	  async function copyToNextWeek() {
110	    const res = await jadwalDokterApi.copyNextWeek(weekStart.value)
111	    await fetchAvailableWeeks()
112	    await fetchAll()
113	    return res.data // { success, data:{copied,skipped,target_week}, message }

16	// ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ Request interceptor ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
17	api.interceptors.request.use(

20	    if (token) {
